title: Argentinian Chicken Empanadas
description: A classic Argentinian dish, these empanadas are filled with juicy chicken and baked to perfection.
instructions: Cut the chicken into small pieces and season with argentinian seasoning.
In a pan, cook the chicken over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the chopped tra to the pan and cook until softened.
In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese with 1 egg.
Roll out the empanada dough and cut into circles.
Place a spoonful of the chicken mixture onto one half of the dough circle.
Brush the edges with the egg mixture and fold the dough in half.
Bake the empanadas for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
